posts.text:
🚨BREAKING: 19 states are STILL refusing to give the Trump admin. IRS and DHS data in an attempt to protect illegal aliens from deportation.

This data needs to be SEIZED and all illegals removed and deported ASAP!

Follow: @BoLoudon

Video

🚨BREAKING: Stephen Miller just EXPOSED Blue states for being the ONLY STATES that refused to "share their voter rolls so we can scrub illegal aliens."

"Every blue state refused. They sued us."

Follow: @BoLoudon

Video

🚨BREAKING: President Trump can’t stop SHOWERING PRAISE & LOVE on his wife, First Lady Melania Trump, in front of a PACKED Mar-a-Lago crowd.

“She had the NUMBER ONE movie, and now she has the NUMBER ONE streaming.”

Follow: @BoLoudon

Video

🚨BREAKING: President Trump just made a SURPRISE ENTRANCE at a Mar-a-Lago event with his IMPRESSIVE DANCE MOVES and is now speaking to the crowd.

God bless you, Mr. Best President!

Follow: @BoLoudon

Video

🚨BREAKING: Queen of Rap @NICKIMINAJ just WARNED those in Congress that going against the SAVE America Act will be "the beginning of the end for them."

"I don’t think they’ve thought it out. Perhaps they should rethink.💭"

Follow: @BoLoudon

Video

🚨BREAKING: President Trump just honored the life of "GREAT SUPPORTER" Chuck Norris.

"He was a great guy. Wow. A really good, tough cookie, you didn't wanna fight him... Wow. That's too bad."

RIP, Chuck.🙏

Follow: @BoLoudon

Video

🚨BREAKING: President Trump just stood up for Tulsi Gabbard and said she “did a GOOD JOB yesterday” during her Senate hearing.

Congratulations, @TulsiGabbard!

Follow: @BoLoudon

Video

Gen-Z has been watching EVERYTHING.

We've SEEN that President Trump has arrested more child traffickers than any other President.

We've SEEN that Trump has ENDED the persecution of Christians & more.

Gen-Z STANDS WITH Trump.

Gen-Z will be the generation that CONTINUES MAGA!🇺🇸

Video

🚨BREAKING: President Trump's admin. is now working to REQUIRE U.S. citizenship for anyone to use federally-funded housing.

This is what I voted for!

Follow: @BoLoudon

Video

🚨BREAKING: Houston TSA lines are now OVER 150 MINUTES LONG and wrap around the airport and into baggage claim thanks to Chuck Schumer refusing to fund DHS.

Thank a Democrat!

Follow: @BoLoudon

Video

🚨BREAKING: Chuck Schumer and Senate Democrats are TOAST now that EVEN CNN is being forced to cover the hours-long TSA lines thanks to them refusing to fund DHS.

Democrats don't care about you, they care about ILLEGALS.

Follow: @BoLoudon

Video

🚨INCREDIBLE: Georgians are set to have their state income tax ELIMINATED if Trump-endorsed candidate for Georgia Governor @BurtJonesForGA wins.

This is a great campaign promise from Burt.

Follow: @BoLoudon

Video

🚨BREAKING: @SaraEisen just TOOK ON the Leftist co-hosts of "The View" and left them speechless as she SCHOOLED THEM.

"They've had success. They returned 20 living hostages."

Follow: @BoLoudon

Video

In 2015, @BurtJonesForGA was one of the first elected officials to publicly endorse President Trump.

Now, he's running for Governor of Georgia and he's endorsed by Trump.

No one treats their supporters better than TRUMP!

Video

🚨BREAKING: President Trump just DISMANTLED & EMBARRASSED the fake news media to their faces:

"When you can get 94 percent [bad] press and you win in a landslide, that means the press is not respected. People have no confidence in it."

Follow: @BoLoudon

Video

35 years ago this week, President Trump met the legendary Chuck Norris in Los Angeles, California for Wrestlemania VII.

We lost a true icon today.

Rest in peace, Chuck. Pray for his family.

Video

🚨BREAKING: Japan's First Female PM, Conservative Sanae Takaichi, has declared President Trump the "ONLY" person who can "achieve peace across the world!"

Blessed are the peacemakers.

Follow: @BoLoudon

Video

🚨BREAKING: @StephenASmith just WENT BALLISTIC on Democrats who "don't mind letting some ILLEGALS VOTE."

"That's inexcusable!"

Follow: @BoLoudon

Video

🚨BREAKING: @SenJohnKennedy just DESTROYED RINO Republicans advocating for NOT moving forward with the SAVE America Act.

"Why not give it a shot. It’s common sense to me."

Follow: @BoLoudon

Video

🚨BREAKING: MSNBC, now MS NOW, is in a FULL MELTDOWN over James Comey being SUBPOENAED for his involvement in the Trump-Russia hoax.

No one is above the law, right?

Follow: @BoLoudon

Video
